summary: Iteration 262 - Sovereign AI Advisors Testing Complete. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified including 5 Sovereign cards, purchase modal, chat view with AI responses, cross-sovereign bridging, language indicator, and protocol info section.

issues: Back button click intercepted by navigation overlay (SovereignCrossbar z-index issue) - minor UX issue, button still works with force click

critical_code_review_comments: sovereigns.py: All 5 Sovereigns defined with correct tier mappings (grand_architect=architect, master_harmonic=sovereign, principal_economist=resonance, chief_logistics=resonance, sovereign_ethicist=discovery)
sovereigns.py: TIER_RANK hierarchy correctly implemented (discovery=0, resonance=1, sovereign=2, architect=3)
sovereigns.py: MONETIZATION_SENTINEL_RULES embedded in system prompt - enforces cash-free transactions
sovereigns.py: CROSS_SOVEREIGN_MAP defines bridging recommendations between sovereigns
sovereigns.py: build_system_prompt() includes language-aware responses, sentinel rules, and bridge instructions
sovereigns.py: Chat endpoint stores both user and assistant messages in sovereign_chats collection
sovereigns.py: History endpoint returns messages sorted by created_at ascending
SovereignAdvisors.js: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
SovereignAdvisors.js: PurchaseModal shows session cost and user balance with affordability check
SovereignAdvisors.js: ChatMessage component parses [BRIDGE:sovereign_id] tags from responses
SovereignAdvisors.js: Language indicator shows current language from LanguageContext
SovereignAdvisors.js: Protocol info section explains DNA-level protocol rules
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with ~171 Dust balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 262 verified 5 Sovereign AI Advisors feature: (1) GET /api/sovereigns/list returns all 5 sovereigns with correct access status based on user tier. (2) POST /api/sovereigns/purchase-session deducts 50 Dust and grants access to locked sovereigns. (3) POST /api/sovereigns/chat sends message and returns AI response with bridge recommendations. (4) GET /api/sovereigns/history/{sovereign_id} returns persistent chat history. (5) DELETE /api/sovereigns/history/{sovereign_id} clears chat history. (6) Tier gating: Discovery user gets free access to Ethicist only, others cost 50 Dust. (7) 403 error when chatting with locked sovereign without session. (8) 400 error for invalid sovereign IDs. (9) Frontend: /sovereigns page shows all 5 Sovereign cards with names, modules, tier labels. (10) Frontend: Locked sovereigns show '50 Dust' badge, accessible ones show 'Consult'. (11) Frontend: Clicking locked sovereign opens Purchase Modal with Dust cost and balance. (12) Frontend: Chat view loads with sovereign name, input bar, send button, clear history button. (13) Frontend: AI responses include cross-sovereign bridge recommendations. (14) Frontend: Language indicator shows current language code (EN). (15) Frontend: Protocol info section at bottom of page. (16) data-testids: sovereign-card-{id}, sovereign-advisors-page, sovereign-chat-view, chat-input, send-btn, back-to-list-btn, clear-history-btn, purchase-modal, confirm-purchase-btn, sovereigns-title, sovereign-stats, language-indicator, protocol-info, chat-msg-user, chat-msg-assistant.

backend_list_sovereigns.details: GET /api/sovereigns/list returns 5 sovereigns with correct structure and access status

backend_tier_gating.details: Discovery user has free access to Ethicist only, others require 50 Dust session

backend_purchase_session.details: POST /api/sovereigns/purchase-session correctly handles free access, already active, and new purchases

backend_chat.details: POST /api/sovereigns/chat returns AI response with bridges array

backend_chat_403.details: Chatting with locked sovereign without session returns 403

backend_history_delete.details: DELETE /api/sovereigns/history/{id} clears history and returns count

backend_language.details: Chat accepts language parameter and returns it in response

frontend_5_sovereign_cards.details: All 5 sovereign cards displayed with correct names, modules, and tier labels

frontend_locked_badges.details: Locked sovereigns show '50 Dust' badge, accessible show 'Consult'

frontend_purchase_modal.details: Purchase modal opens with session cost (50 Dust) and user balance (171 Dust)

frontend_chat_view.details: Chat view shows sovereign name, input bar, send button, clear history button

frontend_ai_response.details: AI response displayed with cross-sovereign bridge recommendation

frontend_protocol_info.details: Protocol info section visible at bottom of page

frontend_data_testids.details: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
